name: Deity VO-7U Tripod Kit
description: Level up your podcasting, gaming, and streaming with the black VO-7U Dynamic Supercardioid USB Streamer Microphone Kit with Desktop Tripod from Deity.

features.Key Features:: For Podcasting, Streaming & Gaming | Desktop Tripod Stand & 9.8' USB Cables | Broadcast Sound from Home Studio | Large-Diaphragm Dynamic Capsule | Supercardioid Pickup Cuts Background | 12 RGB LED Lighting Effects | USB Type-C for Computers, Mobile Devices | Adjustable Mic Gain + Analog Limiter | Mute Button, 3.5mm Headphone Jack | Metal Body with Floating Friction Pivot
features.What's in The Box?: Deity Microphones VO-7U Dynamic Supercardioid USB Streamer Microphone Kit with Desktop Tripod (Black) | Desktop Tripod Stand | Thread Adapter | USB Type-A to USB Type-C Cable (9.8') | USB Type-C to USB Type-C Cable (9.8')
